response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified song title 'アカシア' (Acacia) from top-left corner text. 
2. Identified performers as Oozora Subaru, Otonose Kanade, and Shirogane Noel via context clues from video title '#音乃瀬奏生誕祭2025' and model recognition.
3. Performed search for the lyrics of 'Acacia' by BUMP OF CHICKEN using the query: '"Acacia" BUMP OF CHICKEN Japanese and English lyrics'. 
4. Used the search results to populate lyrics in both Japanese and English.
5. Segmented the video into a musical performance (00:00-03:12) and a subsequent dialogue segment (03:13-04:58).
response.global_summary: A performance of the song 'Acacia' by BUMP OF CHICKEN, performed by Oozora Subaru, Otonose Kanade, and Shirogane Noel, followed by a post-performance conversation segment.

scenes.description: Performers Oozora Subaru, Otonose Kanade, and Shirogane Noel sing 'Acacia' on a concert stage.
scenes.performer_in_video: Oozora Subaru, Otonose Kanade, Shirogane Noel
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
透明よりも綺麗な
あの輝きを確かめに行こう
そうやって始まったんだよ
たまに忘れる程強い理由
冷たい雨に濡れる時は
怖さを比べて
泣いたり笑ったりする
君の命が揺れる時は
誰よりも特等席で
僕も同じように
息をしていたい
言えないこと　聞かないままで
消えない傷の　意味知らないままで
でも　目があえば　笑えるのさ
涙を挟んでも
転んだら　手を貸してもらうよりも
優しい言葉選んでもらうよりも
隣で信じてほしいんだ
どこまでも一緒にいけると
ついにたどり着くその時
夢の正体　愛に触れる時
必ず　一番そばで
君の目に映る景色にいたい
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
More beautiful than transparency
Let's go check that radiance
That's how it started
A strong reason that sometimes forgets
When we get wet in the cold rain
We compare our fear
And cry out while we laugh
When we are shaking
Even if our lives are trembling
We're standing in the seat of honor
More than anyone else
Just like that
I want to keep breathing
Even when the sun is gone
I can still walk
Because I have you
Everything is visible, even the things
I couldn't say before it fades
Even if the meaning of the scar
I didn't know is gone
But if we meet, we can laugh
Even if we are holding our tears
If we fall, rather than having you lend a hand
Rather than choosing kind words
I want to believe in you, standing beside me
Until the end, we can go together
Finally, when we reach that moment
When our dream shines brightly
I want to be beside you
I want to be in the scenery reflecting in your eyes

scenes.description: The performers talk to the audience after the song.
